use_cases: User authentication and login for web applications
Secure account access with email/phone and password credentials
Onboarding flow entry point for SaaS platforms
ai_summary: A minimalist login form component featuring a gradient background with decorative blur effects and a floating logo icon. Includes email/phone and password input fields with a password visibility toggle button. Designed with modern SaaS aesthetics using soft shadows, rounded corners, and a clean blue accent color scheme for authentication flows.
